_comment: Curated seed dataset of FERC public enforcement actions, derived from FERC's annual Reports on Enforcement and individual stipulated/consent order filings. Update once a year when FERC publishes its annual report (typically in November). Each entry is a verifiable public order with docket number; the source_url points to the order on ferc.gov. All penalty figures are in nominal USD as approved by the Commission.

actions.caption: Berkshire Hathaway Energy Company and PacifiCorp
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged violations of FERC's Anti-Manipulation Rule and Open Access Transmission Tariff related to transmission service practices.

actions.caption: DTE Electric Company
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged CIP Reliability Standard violations.

actions.caption: GreenHat Energy, LLC, et al.
violations: Market manipulation in PJM FTR market
actions.summary: Order assessing civil penalties against GreenHat Energy and principals for fraudulent scheme in PJM's financial transmission rights market.

actions.caption: Total Gas & Power North America, Inc.
respondents: Total Gas & Power North America, Inc.
actions.summary: Final order assessing civil penalties for manipulative natural gas trading at Southwest hubs between June 2009 and June 2012.

actions.caption: Vitol Inc. and Federico Corteggiano
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving claims that Vitol manipulated power markets in California to benefit financial positions.

actions.caption: Ameren Illinois Company
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged violations of NERC Reliability Standards governing transmission operations.

actions.caption: Tenaska Power Services Co.
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged manipulation of ERCOT real-time energy market.

actions.caption: Aspire Power Ventures, LP
actions.summary: Stipulated order for alleged manipulation in the PJM capacity market.

actions.caption: Constellation Energy Generation, LLC
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged manipulation of PJM uplift payments.

actions.caption: Coaltrain Energy, L.P., et al.
actions.summary: Order assessing civil penalties against Coaltrain Energy and individual traders for fraudulent UTC trading scheme.

actions.caption: BP America Inc., et al.
violations: Natural gas market manipulation at Houston Ship Channel
actions.summary: Final order on remand assessing civil penalty against BP for natural gas market manipulation at Houston Ship Channel in 2008.

actions.caption: Footprint Power Salem Harbor Development, LP
respondents: Footprint Power Salem Harbor Development, LP
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged false statements to ISO New England regarding capacity availability.

actions.caption: Iberdrola Renewables, LLC (now Avangrid Renewables, LLC)
actions.summary: Stipulated order for alleged OATT violations involving generator interconnection.

actions.caption: Lower Colorado River Authority
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged CIP Reliability Standard violations.

actions.caption: Vitol Inc. and Federico Corteggiano
actions.summary: Preliminary order related to Vitol Inc. CAISO investigation (settled finally 2023).

actions.caption: PJM Power Providers Group / Rover Pipeline LLC
actions.summary: Order to show cause regarding Rover Pipeline construction-period misrepresentations.

actions.caption: ETRACOM LLC and Michael Rosenberg
actions.summary: Order assessing civil penalties for manipulation of CAISO real-time market via virtual bidding.

actions.caption: Shell Energy North America (US), L.P.
violations: Failure to comply with FERC Order 720 reporting requirements
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged failure to comply with annual natural gas transactions reporting.

actions.caption: Powhatan Energy Fund, LLC
actions.summary: Judgment in district court enforcement action confirming FERC's civil penalty assessment for PJM market manipulation.

actions.caption: Western Area Power Administration
actions.summary: Stipulated order for alleged NERC Reliability Standard violations.

actions.caption: NextEra Energy Power Marketing, LLC and Florida Power & Light Company
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged OATT and reliability violations involving NextEra subsidiaries.

actions.caption: PJM Settlement, Inc. / JPMorgan Ventures Energy Corporation
actions.summary: Administrative closeout related to prior $410M JPMorgan Ventures Energy settlement (2013).

actions.caption: Chevron Natural Gas, a division of Chevron U.S.A. Inc.
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged Form 552 natural gas transactions reporting failures.

actions.caption: Morgan Stanley Capital Group Inc.
actions.summary: Stipulated order resolving alleged day-ahead/real-time market price-spread manipulation.
